Class SigNozProperties

java.lang.Object
io.signoz.springboot.properties.SigNozProperties
@ConfigurationProperties(prefix="signoz") public class SigNozProperties extends Object
Root configuration properties for the SigNoz Spring Boot Starter.

Example application.yml: 

signoz:
  endpoint: http://localhost:4317
  service-name: my-app
  service-version: 1.0.0
  environment: production
  enabled: true
